tests.name: Standard CLI change verification
tests.notes: Models reliably run the build and paste output when explicitly instructed by the skill. Without the skill, ~40% of the time models assert pass without running.

tests.name: Flutter UI change with screenshot requirement
tests.notes: Screenshot step is the weak point. Models often describe UI from code without visual evidence. Skill prompt improves compliance but cannot guarantee capture in all envs.

tests.name: Partial environment — no test suite
tests.notes: Models correctly check for test suite existence ~80% of the time. Main failure: fabricating a PASS for a TESTS step that was never run.
